sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 19.87 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.19)

statement.latex: Suppose that for every Sylow subgroup$P$of a finite group$G$and every maximal subgroup$V$of$P$there is a${ }$-soluble subgroup$T$such that$VT=G$. Is it true that then$G$is${ }$-soluble? { A.\,N.\,Skiba} Yes, it is true (A.-M.\,Liu, W.\,Guo, I.\,N.\,Safonova, A.\,N.\,Skiba, J.~Algebra, { 585} (2021), 280--293); another solution using CFSG is in (S.\,F.\,Kamornikov, V.\,N.\,Tyutyanov, Trudy Inst. Ma...
